title: Migration Popout Panel UX Refinements
story: As a data migration specialist, I want the migration detail popout panel to have an intuitive tab order with quick access to Status and inline status updates, so that I can efficiently manage field mapping status without extra navigation.
description:
Several UX refinements to the Migration detail popout (slide-out side panel) to improve workflow efficiency.

## Changes
1. **Rename tab**: "Notes" tab renamed to "Status"
2. **Reorder tabs**: Status tab moved from third position to first position
3. **Pencil icon behavior**: Clicking the pencil edit icon on a row now navigates directly to the Status tab
4. **Inline status dropdown**: A Status dropdown added above the notes field so users can change a record's status and have it update the table immediately
5. **Dictionary detail parity**: Same status dropdown functionality extended to the Dictionary detail panel for the "Reporting" field

## Additional Refinements (from review)
- Labels added for Notes and Logic text boxes
- "Submit" button renamed to "Save"
- "Map Field:" prefix removed from the panel title — just the field name is shown
- Fixed bug where left/right navigation arrows broke after updating status or logic and saving
acceptance_criteria: Tab formerly labeled 'Notes' is now labeled 'Status'
Status tab appears in the first position in the tab order
Clicking the pencil edit icon on a migration row opens the popout on the Status tab
Status dropdown is displayed above the notes field in the Status tab
Changing the status dropdown value and saving updates the corresponding row in the table
Dictionary detail panel includes a Reporting status dropdown with the same behavior
Notes and Logic text boxes have visible labels
Panel title shows only the field name without 'Map Field:' prefix
Left/right arrow navigation continues to work correctly after saving status or logic changes
ux_changes: Renamed Notes tab to Status and moved it to first position. Pencil icon click navigates to Status tab. Added inline Status dropdown above notes. Renamed Submit to Save. Removed 'Map Field:' prefix from panel title. Added labels to Notes and Logic boxes. Fixed arrow navigation after save.
middleware_changes: Status dropdown change triggers an update to the migration record. Server-side handler processes the inline status update and returns refreshed row data for the table.
implementation_notes: Implemented tab reorder and rename in the slide-out panel. Added a Status dropdown that triggers an AJAX save on change. Discovered and fixed a bug where the left/right arrow navigation broke after updating logic or notes — the DOM references were lost after the save callback refreshed the panel content. Same dropdown pattern applied to Dictionary detail for the Reporting field.
comment_summary: Developer implemented changes and pushed to staging. Product owner requested additional refinements: add labels to Notes/Logic boxes, rename Submit to Save, and remove 'Map Field:' from the title. A bug was discovered where left/right arrows broke after saving — developer traced it to DOM reference loss on panel refresh and fixed it.
